moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 concludes
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships wrapped up yesterday, with Jannik Sinner taking the Gentlemen's Singles title.

angles.name: Gentlemen's Champion
angles.copy: Jannik Sinner is your 2026 Wimbledon Gentlemen's Singles champion! What a tournament it was.

angles.name: Tournament Recap
angles.copy: That's a wrap on Wimbledon 2026! Two weeks of incredible tennis, drama, and champions crowned. What was your highlight?

moments.title: The Open Championship begins with qualifier
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale kicks off today with the Last-Chance Qualifier, ahead of the main tournament starting Thursday.

angles.name: Qualifier Today
angles.copy: Golf's oldest major is nearly here! The Open Championship begins today with the Last-Chance Qualifier at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale is ready
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is up for grabs! All eyes on Royal Birkdale as The Open Championship gets underway this week. The qualifier starts today!

moments.title: England Women vs India Women Test finishes
moments.blurb: The historic Women's Test Match between England and India at Lord's concludes today, marking a significant moment for women's cricket.

angles.name: Historic Test Concludes
angles.copy: The England Women vs India Women Test at Lord's finishes today! A truly historic occasion for the sport.

moments.title: Love Island UK still heating up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Series 13 continues to dominate screens, with daily drama from the Mallorca villa keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Still glued to the villa? Love Island UK is delivering all the drama this summer. Who's your favourite couple (or least favourite)?

angles.name: Summer Obsession
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island! It's officially the show of the summer. What's been the biggest shocker so far?

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: Season 2 of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premiered yesterday on Netflix, catching up with the pod squad.

angles.name: Post-Pod Drama
angles.copy: Did you tune into 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 yesterday? We NEED to talk about what happened!

moments.title: UK heatwave continues
moments.blurb: A prolonged spell of hot and very warm weather continues across the UK this week, with temperatures easing gradually and a chance of thunderstorms.

angles.name: Staying Hot
angles.copy: Another scorcher for many parts of the UK today! Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool in the continuing heatwave.

angles.name: Thunderstorm Watch
angles.copy: Keep an eye on the forecast! Thunderstorms could break the heat in parts of the UK this week. Stay safe!

moments.title: School summer holidays begin for many
moments.blurb: Many schools across England are breaking up for the summer holidays this week, signalling the start of the long break for students.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The bells are ringing for the last time this academic year for many! Happy summer holidays to all the students breaking up this week!

angles.name: Freedom is Here
angles.copy: Long lie-ins and no homework! Summer holidays are officially here for many students. What's first on your summer to-do list?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart update
moments.blurb: The Official Singles Chart Top 100 for July 9-15 is out, with Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holding strong at Number 1.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is dominating the Official Singles Chart this week. Are you still streaming?

angles.name: New Entries & Movers
angles.copy: The new Official Singles Chart is in! Big hits from Olivia Rodrigo, Ariana Grande, and Harry Styles are all in the Top 10. What's your favourite right now?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival returns to Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, from July 15-18, celebrating Celtic, folk, and traditional music.

angles.name: Hebridean Magic
angles.copy: Get ready for some incredible music! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts this Wednesday in Stornoway. Who's heading to the Outer Hebrides?

angles.name: Folk & Trad
angles.copy: Celebrating the best of Celtic, folk, and traditional music! The Hebridean Celtic Festival runs July 15-18. Pure Scottish vibes!

moments.title: England Men take on India in ODI
moments.blurb: England's Men's Cricket team will renew their rivalry with India in a Metro Bank ODI match this Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Big Cricket Clash
angles.copy: England vs India in an ODI this Sunday! Get ready for some top-class cricket action.

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, Splendour, takes place this weekend, July 18-19, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Nottingham's Biggest
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is this weekend! Who's heading to Wollaton Hall for Nottinghamshire's biggest music event?

moments.title: The Hundred 2026 season begins
moments.blurb: The sixth season of The Hundred, the 100-ball cricket tournament, bowls off on Tuesday, July 21, promising high-octane action.

angles.name: Cricket's Fastest Format
angles.copy: Get ready for rapid-fire cricket! The Hundred 2026 season starts next Tuesday. Which team are you backing for the title?

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' premieres
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', which premieres this Friday, July 17, on BBC One and iPlayer.

angles.name: New BBC Comedy
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! 'Ann Droid' starts this Friday on BBC One. Your weekend viewing sorted!

moments.title: Welsh-set thriller 'Prisoner' on NOW
moments.blurb: The new thriller 'Prisoner', featuring a convoy moving a criminal through a remote Welsh road tunnel, is available to stream on NOW.

angles.name: Welsh Thriller
angles.copy: Looking for a new thriller? 'Prisoner', set in a remote Welsh road tunnel, is now streaming on NOW. Perfect for a rainy day!

moments.title: Roger McGuinn is 84
moments.blurb: Today, July 13th, is the 84th birthday of Roger McGuinn, co-founder and frontman of The Byrds.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the iconic Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! What's your favourite Byrds track?

moments.title: Dan Reynolds is 39
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 14th, is the 39th birthday of Dan Reynolds, lead singer of multi-platinum band Imagine Dragons.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 39th Birthday to Imagine Dragons frontman, Dan Reynolds, tomorrow! What's your go-to song?

moments.title: Olly Alexander is 36
moments.blurb: This Wednesday, July 15th, marks the 36th birthday of Olly Alexander, lead singer of Years & Years and recent UK Eurovision representative.

angles.name: Years & Years Star
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to the fantastic Olly Alexander of Years & Years this Wednesday! Which of his hits is your favourite?

moments.title: Luke Hemmings is 30
moments.blurb: This Thursday, July 16th, Luke Hemmings, lead singer of 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday.

angles.name: 5SOS Frontman
angles.copy: Big 3-0 for 5 Seconds of Summer's Luke Hemmings this Thursday! Send your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Geezer Butler is 77
moments.blurb: This Friday, July 17th, Geezer Butler, the legendary bassist and lyricist of Black Sabbath, turns 77.

angles.name: Black Sabbath Icon
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Black Sabbath's legendary bassist, Geezer Butler, this Friday! What's your favourite Sabbath riff?

moments.title: Brian May is 79
moments.blurb: This Sunday, July 19th, marks the 79th birthday of Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May of Queen this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

moments.title: Carlos Santana is 79
moments.blurb: Next Monday, July 20th, the legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Next Monday, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of the legendary Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana track to chill out to?
